data.html:
/* sections.css — per-section styling. Hero is the only fully-built section for now;
   the remaining 15 are placeholders (see TODOs in index.html).
   All color/size via tokens.css custom properties. */

/* ─────────────────────────── Hero (split layout) ─────────────────────────── */
.hero {
  padding-block: clamp(1.5rem, 4.2vw, 3.3rem);
}
.hero__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
  align-items: center;
}
.hero__copy {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.1rem;
}
.hero .section__title {
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}
.hero .section__lead {
  margin-top: -0.2rem;
}
.hero__ctas {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}
.hero__stats {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  font-weight: 600;
}
.hero__stats strong {
  color: var(--primary);
}
.hero__stats .hero__dot {
  color: var(--text-dim);
}

/* right column */
.hero__visual {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

@media (min-width: 880px) {
  .hero__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 0.95fr;
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §2 Providers (giant number) ─────────────────────────── */
.providers__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
  align-items: center;
}

/* left column — giant number */
.providers__hero {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}
.providers__giant {
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}
.providers__label {
  margin-top: -0.4rem;
}
.providers__label-word {
  font-size: var(--step-2);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  color: var(--text);
}
.providers__tagline {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-1);
  max-width: 28ch;
}
.providers__badge {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 0.7rem;
}
.chip--accent {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-3) 45%, transparent);
  background: var(--grad-soft);
  color: var(--text);
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* right column — category list */
.providers__cats {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}
.cat-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.65rem;
}
.cat-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  background: var(--surface);
  transition: border-color 0.18s var(--ease), background 0.18s var(--ease);
}
.cat-row:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-strong);
  background: var(--surface-2);
}
.cat-row__count {
  flex: none;
  min-width: 2.6ch;
  font-size: var(--step-2);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  background: var(--grad-brand);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  color: transparent;
}
.cat-row__body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.1rem;
  min-width: 0;
}
.cat-row__name {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: var(--step-1);
  color: var(--text);
}
.cat-row__ex {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step--1);
}
.providers__more {
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  font-weight: 600;
}
.providers__more strong {
  color: var(--primary);
}
.providers__more .providers__dot {
  color: var(--text-dim);
}
.providers__cta {
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  align-self: flex-start;
}

@media (min-width: 880px) {
  .providers__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 0.85fr 1.15fr;
    align-items: start;
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §3 Features (bento + marquee) ─────────────────────────── */
.features__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}
.features__head .section__title {
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §4 CLIs (converging config) ─────────────────────────── */
.clis__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}
/* split: config card beside a compact grid of supported tools */
.clis__split {
  margin-top: clamp(1.4rem, 4vw, 2.2rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  align-items: start;
}
.clis__grid {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 0.6rem;
}
.clis__logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  background: var(--surface);
  font-size: var(--step--1);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text);
  transition: border-color 0.18s var(--ease), transform 0.18s var(--ease);
}
.clis__logo:hover {
  border-color: var(--primary);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.clis__logo img {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  object-fit: contain;
}
@media (min-width: 880px) {
  /* config card (left) + 3-column tool grid (right) */
  .clis__split {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 340px) 1fr;
    gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
    align-items: center;
  }
  .clis__grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §5 Why (pain/solution) ─────────────────────────── */
.why__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}
.why__table {
  margin-top: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3rem);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.why__row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.why__row:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}
.why__row--head {
  background: var(--surface-2);
}
.why__pain,
.why__fix {
  padding: 0.85rem 1.1rem;
  font-size: var(--step-0);
}
.why__pain {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.why__fix {
  color: var(--text);
  font-weight: 600;
}
.why__row--head .why__th {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
}
.why__flow {
  margin-top: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3rem);
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}
.why__flow-node {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--surface);
  font-size: var(--step--1);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text);
}
.why__flow-node b {
  color: var(--primary);
  margin-inline-end: 0.1rem;
}
.why__flow-node--start {
  background: var(--grad-soft);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 45%, transparent);
  font-weight: 700;
}
.why__flow-arrow {
  color: var(--primary);
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §6 Compare ─────────────────────────── */
.compare__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 64ch;
}
.compare__note {
  margin-top: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step--1);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 80ch;
}
.compare__note em {
  color: var(--text);
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §7 Deploy ─────────────────────────── */
.deploy__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}

@media (min-width: 700px) {
  .why__row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  }
  .why__pain {
    border-bottom: none;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §8 Combos ─────────────────────────── */
.combos__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 64ch;
}
.combos__code {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.85em;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--grad-soft);
  padding: 0.1em 0.35em;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  color: var(--accent-3);
}
.combos__modes {
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.2rem);
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}
.combos__mode {
  font-size: var(--step-0);
}
.combos__mode code {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: inherit;
}
.combos__or {
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.2rem);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-1);
  font-weight: 600;
}
.combos__foot {
  margin-top: clamp(1.4rem, 4vw, 2rem);
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  font-weight: 600;
}
.combos__foot strong {
  color: var(--primary);
}
.combos__foot .combos__dot {
  color: var(--text-dim);
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §9 Quota ─────────────────────────── */
.quota__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
  align-items: center;
}
.quota__copy {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.quota__badges {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}
.quota__card-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 460px;
  justify-self: center;
}

@media (min-width: 880px) {
  .quota__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .quota__card-wrap {
    justify-self: end;
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §10 Compression ─────────────────────────── */
.compression__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §11 Resilience ─────────────────────────── */
.resilience__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 64ch;
}
.layers {
  margin-top: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
  max-width: 760px;
}
.resilience__foot {
  margin-top: clamp(1.4rem, 4vw, 2rem);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 70ch;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §12 Proxy & Stealth ─────────────────────────── */
.proxy__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  max-width: 64ch;
}
.proxy__cols {
  margin-top: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: var(--gap);
}

@media (min-width: 760px) {
  .proxy__cols {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── Free-forever logos strip (quota) ─────────────────────────── */
.quota__forever {
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.4rem);
  text-align: center;
}
.quota__forever-label {
  font-size: var(--step--1);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--primary);
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}
.quota__forever-logos {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}
.quota__forever-logos li {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--surface);
  font-size: var(--step--1);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text);
}
.quota__forever-logos img {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  object-fit: contain;
}
.quota__forever-more {
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §13 Dashboard ─────────────────────────── */
.dashboard__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 64ch;
}
.dashboard__url-inline {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.9em;
  color: var(--accent-3);
}
.dashboard__tabs .tabs__panel {
  margin-top: 1.1rem;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §14 Protocols ─────────────────────────── */
.protocols__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 64ch;
}
.protocols__cards {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin-top: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: var(--gap);
}
.protocols__card .card__body strong {
  color: var(--text);
}
.protocols__snippet {
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.2rem);
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §15 Quick Start ─────────────────────────── */
.quickstart__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}
.quickstart__grid {
  margin-top: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
  align-items: center;
}
.quickstart__cta-wrap {
  list-style: none;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
  padding-inline-start: 3.4rem;
}
.quickstart__visual {
  width: 100%;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── §16 CTA ─────────────────────────── */
.cta .container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

/* ─────────────────────────── Footer ─────────────────────────── */
.footer {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-alt);
  padding-block: 2.5rem;
}
.footer__inner {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.footer__brand {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
}
.footer__brand span {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-weight: 500;
}
.footer__links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1.2rem;
}
.footer__links a {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  transition: color 0.18s var(--ease);
}
.footer__links a:hover {
  color: var(--text);
}

/* ─────────────────────────── Responsive — final sections ─────────────────────────── */
@media (min-width: 760px) {
  .protocols__cards {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  }
}
@media (min-width: 880px) {
  /* §15 quick start: steps left, terminal right */
  .quickstart__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── The Promise (benefit band) ─────────────────────────── */
.promise__head,
.in-action__head {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  max-width: 60ch;
}
.promise-grid {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.4rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: var(--gap);
}
.promise-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  padding: 1.3rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  background: var(--surface);
  transition: border-color 0.18s var(--ease), transform 0.18s var(--ease);
}
.promise-card__icon {
  font-size: var(--step-2);
  line-height: 1;
}
.promise-card__title {
  font-size: var(--step-1);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
}
.promise-card__body {
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

/* ─────────────────────────── In Action (video demos) ─────────────────────────── */
.video-grid {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.4rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: var(--gap);
}
.video-card__link {
  display: block;
  color: inherit;
}
.video-card__thumb {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--surface);
}
.video-card__thumb img {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 0.3s var(--ease);
}
.video-card__play {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  margin: auto;
  width: 56px;
  height: 56px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding-inline-start: 4px;
  background: var(--primary);
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  transition: transform 0.18s var(--ease);
}
.video-card__label {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text);
}
@media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) {
  .promise-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--primary);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  .video-card__link:hover .video-card__thumb img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
  }
  .video-card__link:hover .video-card__play {
    transform: scale(1.1);
  }
}
@media (min-width: 760px) {
  .promise-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  }
  .video-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  }
}

/* ─────────────────────────── Compression engine stack ─────────────────────────── */
.comp-stack {
  margin-top: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.4rem);
}
.comp-stack__label {
  font-size: var(--step--1);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--primary);
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}
.comp-stack__list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  counter-reset: layer;
}
.comp-layer {
  counter-increment: layer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  background: var(--surface);
}
.comp-layer::before {
  content: counter(layer);
  flex: none;
  min-width: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: var(--step-0);
  background: var(--grad-brand);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  color: transparent;
}
.comp-layer__name {
  flex: none;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
}
.comp-layer__desc {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--step--1);
}
@media (min-width: 760px) {
  .comp-stack__list {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}
